creator: walker.aj325@gmail.com
text: Excuse me, but this has nothing to do with ZFS support. This is fixing NFSv4 ACL support, which is FreeBSD specific. It's also a significant issue for FreeBSD users because without the patch permissions will be stripped when trying to rsync between FreeBSD servers. This is also not adding a new feature, it is adding something back which was stripped out. Without this rsync is significantly broken for a large number of FreeBSD users.
